concepts.def: Financial scarcity and survival pressure instill spending discipline that persists as a behavioral pattern even after capital becomes available.
aliases: Rented room for $400/month, then saved $400/month by moving to gym floor
Monthly housing cost: $300-400 when splitting one bedroom in six-bedroom house

concepts.name: Delayed Reward Arbitrage in Wealth Compounding
concepts.def: Wealth compounds in the gap between one's willingness to wait and the broader market's impatience; extreme time horizons generate exponential returns unavailable to short-horizon actors.
aliases: Time Value of Money in Wealth Building

concepts.name: Build on Existing Competency Advantage
concepts.def: Select channels and skills that leverage existing competencies (networks, experience, domain knowledge) rather than chasing theoretically optimal but unfamiliar paths.

concepts.name: Free Trial with Card Penalty Conversion Model
concepts.def: Offering free access backed by a credit-card penalty if the client fails to execute removes purchase friction while creating urgency and commitment, accelerating conversion.

concepts.name: Price as Expectation and Quality Frame
concepts.def: Charging a premium price shifts client self-perception and expectations upward, anchoring future negotiations and signaling quality before delivery.

concepts.name: Reverse Eulogy as Values Clarity Tool
concepts.def: Writing your own eulogy surfaces what truly matters (service and character), revealing which current worries are noise and clarifying priority values.

concepts.name: Context as Judgment Dissolvent
concepts.def: Mapping a person's full reinforcement history and constraints dissolves moral judgment and generates compassion; context is the mechanism by which grace is generated.

concepts.name: Founder-Dependent Operations Resist Scaling
concepts.def: Acquiring small businesses on the assumption of easy scaling is typically wrong; founder-dependent operations fail to scale when the founder's attention divides across a portfolio.

concepts.name: Profit-Share Alignment for GM Independence
concepts.def: A GM profit-share structure ties compensation to location performance, aligning incentives and enabling founder withdrawal from day-to-day operations.

concepts.name: Multi-Touch Attribution Ambiguity
concepts.def: When customers touch 5–10 channels before buying, determining which channel deserves credit becomes structurally ambiguous; longer sales cycles compound the problem.

concepts.name: Paid-Plus-Organic Parallel Market Entry
concepts.def: New market entry requires simultaneous low-budget paid ads ($100–200/day fast path) and organic playbook (guaranteed path); neither alone achieves profitability on required timeline.
aliases: Hybrid Market Entry Accelerates Time to Profitability

concepts.name: Client-Financed Acquisition Loop
concepts.def: Selling high-ticket offers generating immediate profit, then reinvesting all proceeds into ads, creates a self-financing acquisition loop that removes ad budget as a growth constraint.

concepts.name: Guided A/B Menu Upsell
concepts.def: Prescribe what the customer needs, offer two options, and enable frictionless payment; this structure outperforms open menus on attach rate.
aliases: Guided Menu Upsell Increases Attach Rate

concepts.name: Acquisition-Only vs Done-For-You Positioning Tradeoff
concepts.def: Done-for-you reduces client friction but imposes operationalization burden; pure acquisition positioning is preferable when operationalization costs exceed margin gain.

concepts.name: Cumulative Secondary Touchpoints Compound Conversion
concepts.def: Secondary touchpoints (events, milestones, content) accumulated over 30 days continue all active channels after primary channel identification; cumulative touch count increases conversion probability.

concepts.name: Burnout as Trainable Capacity Constraint
concepts.def: Burnout is a temporary capacity limit, not a ceiling; work capacity grows with increasing volume provided injury is avoided, analogous to athletic training.

concepts.name: Contingent Refund for Dual Accountability
concepts.def: Client pays upfront; refund is contingent on hitting defined goals or completing actions. Dual accountability (client executes, operator delivers) plus financial skin-in-the-game increases completion rates.
aliases: Community Peer Accountability with Selective Refund

concepts.name: Proof-Promise-Plan Video Introduction Framework
concepts.def: Video introductions should establish credibility (proof), articulate the value promise, and outline the plan; assuming audience knows who you are is a common error.

concepts.name: First-Party Data Pattern Extraction
concepts.def: Extract actionable patterns from proprietary sales, content, and customer data at scale; first-party data outperforms third-party signals for iteration decisions.
